title: Amtech XXSEL25 25mm Padlock
features: DURABLE: This 25mm padlock has a corrosion resistant brass plated body and a 4mm hardened steel shackle
VERSATILE: Supplied with 3 keys, it is ideal for a wide range of security applications
GARDEN ESSENTIAL: A must-have for all types of garden maintenance
LOCKING MECHANISM: Safety lock ensures secure storage after use
SMOOTH ACTION: Spring-loaded for easy repeated cutting
description: Product Description Am-Tech offers a broad range of hand tools and with over one thousand product lines, offers a comprehensive range of products to the D.I.Y and professional user. The Am-Tech range of hand tools includes D.I.Y tools, builders tools, automotive tools, measuring, safety wear, tool kits, padlocks, and much more. The entire Am-Tech hand tool range offers unrivaled branding incorporating stylish packaging design with a range of high quality tools. The Am-Tech range continues to grow and new lines are constantly being sourced to make the Am-Tech brand even stronger. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1 x 25mm padlock See more
